title: Golden Apple Feelings
description:
Do you remember that time where mods and modpacks didn't add complex mechanics, incredible bosses and had a very erratic but epic generation at the same time?

This modpack is perfect if you want to relive those days where everything was simple...
body:
# "Do you remember that time where mods and modpacks didn't add complex mechanics, incredible bosses and had a very erratic but epic generation at the same time?This modpack is perfect if you want to relive those days where everything was simple mixing the essences of the new with the  escence of the classic versions of MC."

**⛏️Purpose:**
This modpack has the purpose of reliving those moments of discovery that one had when encountering an interesting mod or modpack in versions prior to 1.8, in 1.19, offering the classic feeling of nostalgia that these versions had with their erratic generation busted with the modern height limits, a mixture of classic mod mechanics such as gadgets mixed with the capabilities of the new development APIS, this modpack does not seek you to explore the world to save it as if it were an RPG, it seeks what modding Minecraft has always been, with a filter of nostalgia from the past decade that many can identify, seeking in the process to improve weak aspects that the base game ignores, such as optimization and performance.

**⌨️Open source:** But all this falls short of the package's capabilities, because we already know what this game of cubes is like, you will have the limit if you have the right tools, so i allow to any to use this modpack how base for made his version of "Classic future modpack", here only are a few tweaks for vanilla with some plus in mechanics, but if you want remove or tweak something, you can, i dont have any problem with that, only dont try to re-upload the modpack with very small changes or give yourself the credits, maybe what i made is something simple compared with another proyects, but still be are a lot of work behind for my part for made this modpack, so if you gonna make you version of the modpack, try to put my user in the credits please :3

**🛠️Performance:** The modpack was tested using low profile desktops, but the worst computer tested was a 2012 laptop with ubuntu with 8gb of ram and a AMD-A5700 using radeon TM graphics, being able to run in low from 45 to 60fps in singlepayer, so, if the modpack has be able to run the 1.19.2 in a 2012 laptop with linux, i think of probably it can run in may low profile pc, idk, in cases of problems, [there are the issues page](https://github.com/ChromeTV/GappleModpack-issues/issues)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
